howItWorks.title: How We Work
howItWorks.description: A seamless process designed to take your business online without the stress.
howItWorks.footerNote: No commitment, just a quick 15-min chat to see how we can help.

step1.subtitle: Strategic Consultation
step1.description: 15-minute call. We'll understand your brand, goals, and what you need from the website. Clear scope, clear price.

step2.subtitle: Complete Preparation
step2.description: After the deposit is paid, we'll send you a structured form. We need from you: logo, photos, texts, service information. All at once. We can't start without it.

step3.subtitle: Realization in 2-3 Weeks
step3.description: Once we have everything we need, you have a guaranteed website in 2-3 weeks. Design, development, testing, launch. No delays. No waiting.

questions.question: What kind of websites do you make?
questions.answer: We specialize in premium websites for businesses that want to look professional and attract high-quality clients. Beauty & wellness, automotive, food & beverage, fitness, SaaS - if you have a brand that deserves more than a template, we can help.

questions.question: Do you write custom code or use templates?
questions.answer: We write custom code. No WordPress templates, no third-party plugins. But we are flexible - if you prefer Webflow (the ability to edit the site yourself), we can use that. It's up to your needs.

questions.question: Will the website work on mobile?
questions.answer: Always. 60% of visitors use a phone, so the mobile version is priority number one. We design mobile-first and test on real devices.

questions.question: Will we be able to edit the website ourselves?
questions.answer: Yes, if you want. We can build the site on Webflow or Framer, where you can easily change texts, photos, and basic content without coding. Or we can use pure code - faster and more powerful, but we handle the updates. You choose.

questions.question: Will you help us with content (photos, texts)?
questions.answer: With texts, yes - we can include copywriting in the project. For photos, we recommend a professional photographer (we can suggest one) or use your own. We only use stock photos as a last resort - they look generic.

questions.question: Do you provide domain and hosting?
questions.answer: Yes. We can handle the domain (.cz, .com, .eu), hosting, and all the technical stuff. Or if you already have a domain, we'll connect the new site to it. Whatever suits you.

questions.question: How much does it cost?
questions.answer: It depends on the scope of the project. A basic website (5-7 pages) starts at €2,500. More complex projects with e-commerce, booking systems, or advanced features range from €4,000 to €10,000. You'll receive a precise quote after a consultation.

questions.question: How long does it take?
questions.answer: 2-3 weeks from the moment we receive complete content from you (texts, photos, logo). The faster you provide the materials, the faster you have a finished website. No months of waiting.

questions.question: What do you need from us?
questions.answer: Logo, photos (of your products, spaces, team), texts about your services or products, contact information. You'll receive everything in a structured form. The more complete the content you provide, the faster you'll have your website finished.

questions.question: How does payment work?
questions.answer: 50% deposit after proposal approval (before work begins). The remaining 50% before site launch. We invoice normally, payment via bank transfer or card.

questions.question: What if we don't like the design?
questions.answer: One round of revisions is included in the price. If you have comments, we'll adjust. We work until you're satisfied. Additional rounds of revisions can be purchased if the scope of changes significantly increases from the original agreement.

questions.question: Will the website be visible on Google?
questions.answer: Yes. Basic SEO setup is included (meta tags, sitemap, speed, mobile optimization). If you want an active SEO campaign or Google Ads, we can recommend a specialist or handle it as a separate project.

questions.question: Can you integrate [our system]?
questions.answer: Probably yes. We do integrations with booking systems (Calendly, Booksy, Acuity), e-commerce platforms (Shopify, custom solutions), CRM systems (HubSpot, Pipedrive), payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, GoPay), and newsletter tools (Mailchimp, ConvertKit). If you have a specific tool, let us know.

questions.question: Do you offer website maintenance?
questions.answer: Yes. You can order a monthly retainer (starting from €200/month) for regular updates, or an hourly rate (€50-80/hr) for one-off changes. The first month of support is always free.

questions.question: Do you make e-shops too?
questions.answer: Yes. We can create a custom e-shop or integrate Shopify. It depends on the scope (number of products) and required functionality (payments, shipping, warehouses). Tell us your requirements, and you'll get a proposal.

questions.question: Why should we choose you instead of a larger agency?
questions.answer: Larger agencies are often overpriced, slow, and impersonal. With us, you get fast, personal attention and fair prices. You work directly with us, no middlemen. The result is just as good, if not better.

questions.question: Do you have any references or a portfolio?
questions.answer: Yes. A portfolio of concepts and projects can be found in the 'Works' section. We are currently working on high-ticket projects for beauty and wellness clients. We are a young agency, but not new to design and development.

questions.question: What if we change our minds during the project?
questions.answer: The deposit is non-refundable once work has started. However, we can pause the project or adjust the scope if your needs change. We communicate openly to find a fair solution.

whyAccent.title: Why ACCENT?
whyAccent.cta: Grow revenue and maximize your business with our help

reasons.title: No Templates. Ever.
reasons.description: Every website we write from scratch. No WordPress plugins, no Wix templates, no "90% done". You get exactly what you need. Nothing more, nothing less.

reasons.title: Ready in 2-3 Weeks
reasons.description: Most agencies promise 6-8 weeks and deliver in 4 months. We guarantee 2-3 weeks from the moment we have content from you. No delays.

reasons.title: Mobile First
reasons.description: 60% of visitors use a phone. Your website must look and function perfectly on mobile. Always. With us, it's not a "bonus" - it's standard.

reasons.title: Return on Investment
reasons.description: A good website is not an expense. It is an investment that pays off. More quality leads. Higher average client value. Less time spent explaining.
